Process Engineering / Thermal Oil / Energy Systems

Process Engineer

PT Maxxtec Teknologi Indonesia

This role focused on process engineering delivery for thermal oil heating and industrial energy systems, requiring accuracy in calculation, drawing coordination, documentation, and standards-based execution.

Jan 2025 - Nov 2025 Indonesia
process system

Responsibilities

What I handled

  • Support process calculations, technical review, and engineering documentation for thermal oil heater and related equipment projects.
  • Prepare and review technical deliverables using engineering software and project-specific design inputs.
  • Coordinate project information across drawings, datasheets, calculations, and customer/vendor requirements.
  • Work with international project requirements and applicable engineering standards.

Role impact

Value delivered

  • Supported a 7.9 MW thermal oil heater project and other process equipment scopes across multiple concurrent projects.
  • Contributed to improved workflow efficiency through structured engineering documentation and repeatable work methods.
  • Built strong exposure to thermal systems, pressure equipment documentation, and international engineering project discipline.

Systems, tools, and knowledge

HTRIAutodesk InventorAutoCADDraftSightExcelPED 2014/68/EUAD 2000EN 12953EN 13445API 2000
